query:
SELECT 'templates' as tipo, COUNT(*) as total FROM templates_peticao WHERE ativo = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'conhecimentos' as tipo, COUNT(*) as total FROM conhecimentos
UNION ALL
SELECT 'estrategias' as tipo, COUNT(*) as total FROM estrategias
UNION ALL
SELECT 'peticoes_geradas' as tipo, COUNT(*) as total FROM peticoes_geradas;
SELECT id, nome, tipo, SUBSTRING(descricao, 1, 100) as descricao FROM templates_peticao WHERE ativo = 1;
